data.name: HideBook_Question
data.value: Hide Book when Settings > Show Hidden Books is off?

data.name: HideWishlistBook_Question
data.value: Hide Book when Settings > Show Hidden Wishlist Books is off?

data.name: HideCollection_Question
data.value: Hide Collection when Settings > Show Hidden Collections is off? This will also hide any books associated with this collection.

data.name: HideGenre_Question
data.value: Hide Genre when Settings > Show Hidden Genres is off? This will also hide any books associated with this genre.

data.name: HideSeries_Question
data.value: Hide Series when Settings > Show Hidden Series is off? This will also hide any books associated with this series.

data.name: HideLocation_Question
data.value: Hide Location when Settings > Show Hidden Location is off? This will also hide any books associated with this location.

data.name: HideAuthor_Question
data.value: Hide Author when Settings > Show Hidden Authors is off? This will also hide any books associated with this author.

data.name: UpNext_Question
data.value: Queue this book up next for reading?

data.name: AllBooksView_InfoText
data.value: This is a collective list of all the books you own.

data.name: BookMainView_InfoText
data.value: You can view all the information related to 'book'. You can also tap on some of the data to copy.

data.name: ToBeReadView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of all the books you have yet to read. Books will show up here if you have read no pages yet, or if you haven't queued the book up to read next.

data.name: ReadView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of all the books you have read. Books will show up here if you have marked it has 100% read.

data.name: ReadingView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of all the books you are actively reading. Books will show up here if you have read at least one page, or if you have queued the book up to read next.

data.name: BookEditView_InfoText
data.value: This is where you can add or edit data for book.

data.name: SearchForBookByISBNClickCorrectResultToAdd
data.value: Search for book by ISBN. Click correct result to add.

data.name: PleaseAllowCameraPermissionToScanBarcodes
data.value: Please allow Camera permission to scan barcodes!

data.name: PleaseAllowPhotoPermissionToDownloadBookCoverPhotos
data.value: Please allow Photos permission to automatically upload book cover photos!

data.name: PleaseAllowPhotoPermissionToAutomaticallyUploadBookCoverPhotos
data.value: Please allow Photos permission to download book cover photos!

data.name: PleaseConnectToInternetToSearch
data.value: Please connect to Internet to search!

data.name: PleaseAllowPhotoPermissionToAddCover
data.value: Please allow Photo permission to add cover!

data.name: AuthorView_InfoText
data.value: An author is the person who created the book. You can add an author here or in the book.

data.name: CollectionView_InfoText
data.value: Collections are a unique way to group your books that don't fall into the other categories like if you are reading it or if it is in a specific series. You can add a collection here or in the book.

data.name: GenreView_InfoText
data.value: Genres are based on the stylized criteria to group books. You can create your own genres or research and use any existing genres to group your books. You can add a genre here or in the book.

data.name: SeriesView_InfoText
data.value: A series of books are books that have common characteristics, like an author or a publisher. You can create your own series or research and use any existing series to group your books. You can add a series here or in the book.

data.name: LocationView_InfoText
data.value: Locations are a way to group and see where your books physically are. You can add a location here or in the book.

data.name: CollectionMainView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of books you have in 'collection'. You can click from here to add a new or existing book.

data.name: AuthorMainView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of books you have for 'author'. You can click from here to add a new or existing book.

data.name: GenreMainView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of books you have in 'genre'. You can click from here to add a new or existing book.

data.name: SeriesMainView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of books you have in 'series'. You can click from here to add a new or existing book.

data.name: LocationMainView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of books you have in 'location'. You can click from here to add a new or existing book.

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantToDeleteItem_Question
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete item?

data.name: BookHasBeenAddedToGrouping
data.value: Book has been added to grouping.

data.name: ExistingBooksView_InfoText
data.value: This is a list of books that aren't associated to 'grouping.' Click a book to add it.

data.name: ErrorDownloadingImage
data.value: There was an error downloading the image. Try another URL.

data.name: WishListView_InfoText
data.value: Your wishlist is a set of books you do not own but wish to. When you have received the book, you can click on it in the list to move it to your existing library.

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantToMoveBookToYourLibrary_Question
data.value: Are you sure you want to move book to your library?

data.name: BookWasAddedToLibrary
data.value: Book was added to library and the wish list item was deleted.

data.name: Export_Import_Question
data.value: Would you like to import your data from or export your data to a spreadsheet? Make sure to check/uncheck checkboxes before importing or exporting.

data.name: ExportImportView_InfoText
data.value: Since all data is stored locally, you may wish to back up your data or move it to another device. You can even modify the output and reimport back into your library (please do so with caution).

data.name: AreYouSureExport_Question
data.value: Are you sure you want to export your data? This can take a while if you have a large amount of data and/or large images. Please be patient.

data.name: AreYouSureImport_Question
data.value: Are you sure you want to import data? This can take a while if you have a large amount of data and/or large images. Please be patient.

data.name: ChapterGuid
data.value: ChapterGuid [LEAVE THIS COLUMN BLANK TO ADD NEW RECORD]

data.name: CollectionGuid
data.value: CollectionGuid [LEAVE THIS COLUMN BLANK TO ADD NEW RECORD]

data.name: GenreGuid
data.value: GenreGuid [LEAVE THIS COLUMN BLANK TO ADD NEW RECORD]

data.name: SeriesGuid
data.value: SeriesGuid [LEAVE THIS COLUMN BLANK TO ADD NEW RECORD]

data.name: BookAuthorGuid
data.value: BookAuthorGuid [LEAVE THIS COLUMN BLANK TO ADD NEW RECORD]

data.name: AuthorGuid_Blank
data.value: AuthorGuid [LEAVE THIS COLUMN BLANK TO ADD NEW RECORD]

data.name: LocationGuid
data.value: LocationGuid [LEAVE THIS COLUMN BLANK TO ADD NEW RECORD]

data.name: PleaseConnectToInternetToFindBookCover
data.value: Please connect to Internet to find book cover!

data.name: BookGuid_Blank
data.value: BookGuid [LEAVE THIS COLUMN BLANK TO ADD NEW RECORD]

data.name: BookCoverImages
data.value: Book Cover Images (Must be checked with Books or Wishlist)

data.name: WarningThisActionCannotBeUndone
data.value: Warning! This action cannot be undone!

data.name: ErrorParsingDataFromBook
data.value: Error parsing data from book! Please contact support!

data.name: UnableToOverwriteFile_PleaseDelete
data.value: Unable to overwrite file. Please delete filePath and try again.

data.name: UnableToFindBook
data.value: Unable to find book with api.

data.name: ReadingData_InfoText
data.value: This is a running total of all the books and pages you have completed in the past number years. A book is considered completed in a year if the reading end date is in that year, and all the pages in the book are counted for that year.

data.name: ClickToSearchWithGoogleBooks
data.value: Click to Search with Google Books

data.name: SupportInfoText
data.value:
Found a bug? Want to suggest a new feature? Need additional help?
Email us!

data.name: Camera_Description
data.value: This app only needs permission to the Camera when you scan a barcode. If you will not be scanning barcodes, you do not need the permission granted.

data.name: Internet_Description
data.value: This app only needs permission to the Internet to search for a book or to download a book cover from a URL.

data.name: Files_Photos_Description
data.value: This app only needs permission to Files and Photos when importing uploaded book covers from a spreadsheet. If you will not be automatically uploading book covers through the import feature, you do not need the permission granted.

data.name: AreYouSureImageImport_Question
data.value: Are you sure you want to import your images from a file? If so, please select the top level folder for the images.

data.name: DataStorageInfoText
data.value:
All data is stored locally on your device. Nothing is uploaded to a cloud service.
If you delete your data, either through Settings > Delete All Data in the app or by using your device’s Clear Storage option, it cannot be recovered.
Please export and back up your data regularly.

data.name: PictogrammersCredit
data.value: Icons (minus App Icon) by Pictogrammers. Special thanks to the team and their open-source icons! Visit them at

data.name: ImportErrors
data.value: Some spreadsheets were not imported because they either did not exist in the workbook, the spreadsheet did not have any values, or the columns were not in the right order for import.

data.name: BookCoversDownloadMessage
data.value: Because Book Cover Images is selected, any book covers with a URL will be downloaded to your device. You can save or delete these. They are created for archival purposes, should the book cover URL no longer exist.

data.name: UserSelectedImagesMessage
data.value: You have previously selected specific images to share with this app. If you would like to change that, visit the app settings to add or remove images, select to share all images, or remove image sharing from the app.

data.name: PleaseSelectAnotherFolder
data.value: Cannot access this folder. Please select another.
